title: Shaggy Briny Egyptian Potatoes Bake
description: A hearty, dairy-free Egyptian dish featuring shaggy charlotte potatoes, baked in a briny sauce with aromatic spices.
instructions: Peel and chop the potatoes into large chunks, leaving the skin on.
In a large bowl, toss the potatoes with olive oil, onion, garlic, salt, black pepper, cumin, and coriander until they are evenly coated.
Transfer the potatoes to a 9x13 inch baking dish and add the chopped parsley and dill on top.
In a small bowl, whisk together lemon juice and apple cider vinegar, then pour the mixture over the potatoes.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 45 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender when pierced with a fork.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 15 minutes, or until the potatoes are golden brown and crispy on top.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
Garnish with additional parsley and dill, if desired.
Serve hot, straight from the baking dish.
This dish is best served immediately, as the potatoes will continue to absorb the flavors and become soggy if left to sit for too long.
